title: デビュー戦の後に・まずは一歩

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So this... is my current limit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... But I still have a lot to work on, like how I
should start my final sprint and things like that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Real races feel so different from training. I
couldn't move my legs the way I wanted to... let
alone put out as much speed as Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not wrong about that. While watching her
race, I noticed that her strides were less sharp and
crisp than I would've liked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I can explain that in a better way to her.
choice_data_list:
Your legs are better suited to speeding up
gradually.

Your legs are better suited to speeding up
gradually.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... So in other words, they lack the ability to
give out explosive bursts of power, right?
choice_data_list:
Sure, but in return, they have the endurance to
run forever.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! I've never thought about it like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While watching her write in her notebook, I turn
my mind to the next issue at hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the moment, her ultimate goal is to win the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, she'll need to cultivate the
determination to take control of her races, and
learn how to seize the perfect moment to make a
move.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to put all of our energy into the Derby,
we'll have to aim for a top race next.
choice_data_list: Do you want to try running a G1 race?
Do you want to try running a G1 race?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? What? A... a G1?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! If it's okay, I want to race in the Asahi Hai
Futurity Stakes! Please!
choice_data_list: The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, huh?
The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes is a 1,600-meter
race on turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I was thinking more of the
2,000-meter Hopeful Stakes—as a
medium-distance turf race like the Derby, it
seems the more natural choice, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I want to run in the same race Maruzen won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The excitement in her tone is practically palpable.
There's only one thing I can say to her twinkling
eyes.
choice_data_list:
Okay! Let's train for the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Thank you! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...And that's how we decided to take on the Asahi
Hai Futurity Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That means you will be the only one among us to
take on the challenge of becoming the junior
champion.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean I'll be the only one? Aren't
you running in it, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No. My legs have not yet improved sufficiently,
so my debut has been delayed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But this is a good opportunity. Ever since that
day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The Derby. My dream is to run in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting to see the moment you bare
your fangs.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
All I do is for the sake of repaying my
grandfather. All I do is for the sake of my training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I will take this opportunity to assess
your abilities at the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.
Well then, I'll be off.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I should go watch you too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: To... assess me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Who can say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Though of course, I'll only be able to go if I get
permission from my physician.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Do your best, Chiyono O. I'll be cheering you on.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you. Of course. I'll do my best.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...They're both gone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that the flame of destiny has been lit, our
next step is the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.
